specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners actually need — honest work, done right, by people who know boats inside and out.

Our team handles everything from detailed boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control systems, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, underwater hull work without hauling out, a chilled water AC system serviced, or a holding tank and through-hull plumbing overhaul, we have the experience and equipment to get it done properly.

We serve boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding waters, covering a wide 60-mile service area from our Annapolis, MD base. Our clients range from weekend cruisers to liveaboards to commercial vessel operators — anyone who depends on their boat and needs a marine services partner they can count on. We have built our reputation on straightforward communication and quality workmanship, and we take that seriously with every job we take on.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today.
seoKeywords: hull inspection diving services South Florida

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers the structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and overall seaworthiness of a vessel. Whether you need a pre-purchase inspection, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, a proper survey gives you a clear picture of exactly what you're working with before you commit.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and through-hull work to be completed without the time and expense of hauling out. From fouling removal to lost-gear recovery and running gear inspections, in-water diving services keep your vessel operational and your schedule on track.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge of chilled water systems, self-contained units, and seawater cooling loops that differ significantly from residential HVAC. We handle installation, diagnostics, refrigerant service, and seasonal maintenance to keep your onboard climate system running efficiently.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation work covers holding tanks, through-hulls, seacocks, raw water systems, and MSD-compliant waste management setups. Properly maintained sanitation systems protect both your vessel and the waterways, and we make sure every fitting, hose, and valve is up to the job.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks provides mobile marine services based in Annapolis, MD, covering South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine AC system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal maintenance
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul

Running gear and propeller inspection via in-water diving
Insurance or damage survey following a grounding or collision
